message:
feat: static shell-script profile conformance assessment engine

Add assess_shell_script_profile_conformance() to e2e_log_schema.rs that
discovers all e2e/*.sh scripts and validates them against the canonical
traceability inventory. Checks for required structured-telemetry markers
(run_id, scenario_id, phase, event_type, seed, LOG_STANDARD_REF),
inventory registration, and log_schema version assignment.

Produces a ShellScriptConformanceReport with per-script issues at error
and warning severity levels. Scripts missing inventory entries or
required markers are flagged as errors; legacy scripts without
log_schema_version are warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
